Sign in See live receipt
Loops/Session gate
BOOT · every session

Gate before every build.

Enterprise iPaaS ships audit trails at session start — SourceA runs sourcea-boot on every worker chat: policy version, provider, receipt freshness, queue truth. PASS or BLOCK lands on disk before your agent touches product code.

Four checks (live)

  • policy_version — SSOT current on disk
  • provider — semantic retrieval active
  • receipt_fresh — session gate receipt not stale
  • queue_truth — inbox matches factory queue head

Why BLOCK is honest

When receipt_fresh fails, boot-proof.json and the live terminal show BLOCK — prospects see real factory state, not a mocked PASS. That is the procurement wedge.

Ops tab shows this live

Command center Ops panel lists each check PASS/BLOCK from factory-live.json — responsive on mobile, updates on deploy.

Run locally

sourcea-boot --json — same output as proof.html terminal.

Proof chain →
